title: Topic Evidence Rollup
description: The Track B half of a frontend map_data.json cluster: one record per Track A topic, aggregating the topic's linked genes, GWAS, trials, and scores. Joined to Track A on topic_id. Every score carries its components/method so it stays explainable.

pathway_group.description: Dominant pathway_group for the topic (highest summed genetic_support among linked genes), or null when no linked gene maps to a group.

top_genes.description: Linked genes ranked by genetic_support (up to 8).

top_gwas.description: GWAS associations linked via paper_overlap (up to 8, deduped by association_id).

trials.description: Trials whose mechanism_group is the dominant pathway_group's crosswalked trial mechanism (up to 10).

scores.description: Aggregated, explainable scores. genetic_support/functional_support are means over linked genes; clinical_* and translation_gap are copied from the dominant pathway record. A _method string documents the derivation.

evidence_counts.description: Per-topic link tallies backing the rollup.

disease_groups.description: Union of disease_groups across the topic's linked genes (dedup + sorted).

provenance.description: How the record was built, including the Track A snapshot size and its SUBSET / full-run status.
